summary: Iteration 196: Verbale di Posa in Opera - Backend 13/13 tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with all components working. Minor issue: FPC Project page verbale button navigates with project_id instead of commessa_id when commessa_id is not set.

minor.issue: Returns 404 when called with FPC project_id instead of commessa_id. FPC projects may not have commessa_id linked.

integration_issues.issue: When FPC project doesn't have commessa_id, button navigates to /verbale-posa/{project_id} which returns 404. Button should be hidden or disabled when commessa_id is not available.

issues: React hydration warnings in console (span inside tbody/tr) - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

action_items: FPCProjectPage.js: Only show 'Genera Verbale di Posa' button when project.commessa_id exists, or add backend support to lookup commessa by preventivo_id
critical_code_review_comments: verbale_posa.py: All 4 endpoints working correctly (context, get, save, pdf)
verbale_posa.py: PDF generation uses WeasyPrint and produces valid 20KB PDF
verbale_posa.py: Photo upload saves to /app/backend/uploads/verbale_posa/ with max 3 photos, 10MB limit
verbale_posa.py: Signature stored as base64 data URL from canvas.toDataURL()
VerbalePosaPage.js: All UI components present - Dati Cantiere form, Materials table, Checklist (4 checkboxes), Note field, Photo upload, Signature canvas
VerbalePosaPage.js: PDF button visible after save, Invia a CIMS button disabled as expected
FPCProjectPage.js: Verbale button present but uses project.commessa_id || project.project_id fallback which fails when commessa_id is undefined

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all UI elements working, minor navigation issue from FPC project)

seed_data_creation: Verbale was saved during testing with test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 196 verified Verbale di Posa in Opera feature. Key findings: (1) All backend endpoints working - context, get, save, pdf. (2) PDF generation produces valid 20KB PDF with WeasyPrint. (3) Frontend page has all required components - form fields, materials table, 4 checkboxes, note field, photo upload (max 3), signature canvas. (4) Save button works and shows success toast. (5) PDF button visible after save. (6) Invia a CIMS button disabled as expected. (7) Minor issue: FPC Project page verbale button fails when project doesn't have commessa_id linked - navigates to /verbale-posa/{project_id} which returns 404.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/verbale-posa/context/{commessaI: PASS - Returns commessa data with materials, lotti, ddts
backend_endpoints.GET /api/verbale-posa/{commessaId}: PASS - Returns saved verbale data with exists=true
backend_endpoints.POST /api/verbale-posa/{commessaId}: PASS - Saves verbale with form data, checklist, signature

VerbalePosaPage (/verbale-posa/com_e8c48.dati_cantiere_form: PASS - All inputs present (data_posa, luogo, responsabile)
VerbalePosaPage (/verbale-posa/com_e8c48.photo_upload: PASS - Drag-and-drop zone with Max 3 badge
VerbalePosaPage (/verbale-posa/com_e8c48.signature_canvas: PASS - Canvas responds to mouse drawing
VerbalePosaPage (/verbale-posa/com_e8c48.save_button: PASS - Saves and shows 'Verbale salvato!' toast
VerbalePosaPage (/verbale-posa/com_e8c48.pdf_button: PASS - Visible after save, generates downloadable PDF
VerbalePosaPage (/verbale-posa/com_e8c48.cims_button: PASS - Visible but DISABLED as expected

FPCProjectPage (/tracciabilita/progetto/.button_text: PASS - 'Genera Verbale di Posa in Opera'
FPCProjectPage (/tracciabilita/progetto/.navigation: ISSUE - Navigates to /verbale-posa/{project_id} which returns 404 when commessa_id not linked
